description_long: This is a large, modern passenger bus with a predominantly blue and purple exterior, featuring the branding 'EIBAR' and 'SD EIBAR' prominently on both sides. The bus has a streamlined, rectangular body with a white roof and large, tinted rectangular windows running along the sides, separated by thin vertical pillars. The front of the bus is equipped with a wide windshield, side mirrors, and headlights, while the rear displays taillights and additional branding. The sides are decorated with sports-themed graphics, including a basketball and a red cross, and the bus appears to have a single main passenger door on the right side. The wheels are black with metallic hubcaps, and the overall design suggests a vehicle used for team or group transport in urban environments.
description: A modern, blue and purple passenger bus with 'EIBAR' branding, large side windows, and sports-themed graphics. It features a white roof, prominent front windshield, and a single main passenger door.
description_view_0: The right side of the bus is visible, showing the large 'EIBAR' branding, sports graphics, and the main passenger door near the front.
description_view_1: The rear and left side of the bus are visible, highlighting the back window, taillights, and additional 'SD EIBAR' branding.
description_view_2: The left side of the bus is shown, featuring the 'EIBAR' branding, sports graphics, and a clear view of the side windows without a visible passenger door.
description_view_3: The front and right side of the bus are visible, showing the wide windshield, headlights, side mirrors, and the main passenger door.
attribute_window_arrangement: There are six large, rectangular, evenly spaced passenger windows along each side, separated by thin vertical pillars, with a consistent height and width.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: A logo resembling a stylized 'V' with a circle above it is visible on the front and side, next to the 'SD EIBAR' text.
